v.code: /* rubric: P1 */ const payload = label && label.v; if (!Array.isArray(payload)) { V1N.addLabel('home_pin_error', 'json', { code: 'temporary_modeltable_required', detail: 'home pin payload must be temporary ModelTable array' }); return; } const get = (key, fallback = null) => { const rec = payload.find((item) => item && item.id === 0 && item.p === 0 && item.r === 0 && item.c === 0 && item.k === key); return rec && Object.prototype.hasOwnProperty.call(rec, 'v') ? rec.v : fallback; }; if (get('__mt_payload_kind', '') !== 'home_owner_requests.v1') { V1N.addLabel('home_pin_error', 'json', { code: 'invalid_payload_kind', detail: 'expected home_owner_requests.v1' }); return; } const requests = get('requests', null); V1N.addLabel('home_pin_error', 'json', null); if (!Array.isArray(requests)) { V1N.addLabel('home_pin_error', 'json', { code: 'invalid_request_shape', detail: 'requests must be array label in temporary ModelTable payload' }); return; } for (const req of requests) { const body = req && req.body; if (!req || typeof req.out_pin !== 'string' || !req.out_pin || !Array.isArray(body)) { V1N.addLabel('home_pin_error', 'json', { code: 'invalid_request_shape', detail: 'requests[] item invalid or body not temporary ModelTable array' }); return; } V1N.addLabel(req.out_pin, 'pin.out', body); }

/* rubric: P5+P8 */ const mailboxRead = ctx.hostApi.readCrossModel(-1, 0, 0, 1, 'bus_event'); const mailbox = mailboxRead && mailboxRead.ok && mailboxRead.data ? mailboxRead.data.v : null; const payload = (mailbox || {}).payload || {}; const action = typeof payload.action === 'string' ? payload.action : 'home_unknown'; const opId = payload.meta && typeof payload.meta.op_id === 'string' ? payload.meta.op_id : ''; ctx.hostApi.writeCrossModel(-1, 0, 0, 1, 'bus_event_error', 'json', { op_id: opId, code: 'home_dispatch_blocked', detail: action + ':authoritative_via_server_pin_only' });
